sources.notes: Statement and constraints: choose possible apartment positions after closing at most k bars.
Official editorial for Codeforces Round 1021; used to confirm the median interval solution.
Luogu writeup cross-checks the sorted median interval after removing k bars.

annotation.summary: Count integer house positions that can become a minimizer of total distance to the remaining open bars after closing at most k bars.
annotation.constraints: Sum n <= 100000 and coordinates up to 1e9; sorting and O(1) interval extraction per test case are sufficient.
annotation.core_idea: For a fixed remaining multiset, the minimizers of sum |x-y| are exactly its median interval. To make x possible, it is enough to keep n-k bars whose median interval contains x; closing fewer bars can be padded to exactly k. After sorting all bar positions, the union of possible median intervals collapses to one interval: the lower endpoint is the median forced by deleting up to k largest/outer bars, and the upper endpoint is the symmetric median after deleting up to k smallest/outer bars. The answer is the length of that integer interval.
annotation.complexity: O(n log n) per test case
tricks: Use the median characterization of L1 minimizers.
Assume exactly k bars are closed because closing extra bars only expands possibilities.
After sorting, the possible medians form one contiguous interval.

solution_variants.name: sorted-median-interval
solution_variants.summary: Sort bar positions, compute the leftmost and rightmost possible median endpoints after removing k bars, and output their integer interval length.

tags.evidence: The decisive fact is that minimizing the sum of absolute distances is equivalent to lying in the median interval of the remaining bars.
tags.description: Use the median or median interval as the optimizer of an L1 distance objective, often after deletions or choices change the multiset.
tags.created_reason: Existing median-threshold tags cover +/-1 threshold transforms, not L1 median minimization intervals.

tags.evidence: Sorting the bar positions exposes the exact median endpoints after deleting k bars.
All possible answers are represented as one contiguous integer interval.
